concept: AI 피아노 엔진 Liszt 소개 영상 — 피아니스트 + AI 협주

prompts.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a pianist's hands playing a grand piano, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field, slow motion fingers pressing ivory keys, concert hall ambiance, 4K, dramatic lighting from above

Abstract visualization of neural network processing music, glowing blue and gold particles forming musical notes and piano keys, data flowing through transformer architecture, dark background with luminous connections, futuristic holographic display
Wide shot of an empty grand concert hall with a single Steinway grand piano on stage, dramatic spotlight, rows of velvet seats, golden architectural details, anticipation atmosphere, 4K cinematic

Player piano with keys moving by themselves, no pianist visible, ghost performance, dramatic side lighting casting long shadows on white keys, close-up tracking shot moving along the keyboard, haunting beautiful atmosphere

Millions of glowing MIDI notes floating in dark space, converging into a grand piano shape, particles of light transforming into musical score sheets, cinematic camera orbit, blue and white color palette

Split screen: left side shows human pianist playing passionately, right side shows digital holographic pianist mirroring the performance, both sides merging in the center, warm vs cool color contrast, concert stage
19th century concert hall, romantic era atmosphere, a silhouette of Franz Liszt at the piano, candlelight, dramatic shadows, oil painting coming to life, golden baroque interior, cinematic slow zoom

Dark space with a single beam of light illuminating floating musical notes that arrange themselves to spell 'LISZT', grand piano silhouette in background, particles dispersing like stardust, epic cinematic reveal, warm golden glow

workflow.step1: Wan2.1 T2V로 각 장면 5초 클립 생성
workflow.step3: Liszt 엔진이 생성한 피아노 MIDI → 오디오 렌더링
workflow.step4: 영상 + 오디오 편집 (DaVinci Resolve 또는 ffmpeg)
